title: LICHEN_LINK_KEY_LEN used but may not be defined when CONFIG_LICHEN_LINK is disabled
description:
In lichen_l2.c lines 476-479, LICHEN_LINK_KEY_LEN is used to size rx_link_key[]. This code is inside #if HAVE_LICHEN_LINK, which depends on CONFIG_LICHEN_LINK. The macro LICHEN_LINK_KEY_LEN presumably comes from <lichen/link.h> included at line 29 (also guarded by CONFIG_LICHEN_LINK).

This is currently correct, but the pattern is fragile: if someone adds code using LICHEN_LINK_KEY_LEN outside the HAVE_LICHEN_LINK guard, it will fail to compile only when CONFIG_LICHEN_LINK is disabled - a build configuration that may be rarely tested.

Risk: Copy-paste error by contributor adding new code that references LICHEN_LINK_KEY_LEN outside the guard.

Consider: Adding a compile-time assert or comment at the LICHEN_LINK_KEY_LEN usage site noting the guard dependency.

Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_l2.c line 476
